name: revenuecat-mcp
description: StoreOps MCP tools for RevenueCat products, entitlements, offerings, customers, paywalls, metrics, and monetization audits.

interface.shortDescription: Manage RevenueCat catalog, offerings, customers, paywalls, and metrics.
interface.longDescription: StoreOps MCP adds a local stdio MCP server for authenticated RevenueCat operations: projects, apps, products, entitlements, entitlement-product mappings, offerings, customers, customer purchases/subscriptions/entitlements, paywalls, metrics overview, and catalog health audits. Credentials are read from environment variables.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use StoreOps RevenueCat tools to audit products, entitlements, offerings, customers, paywalls, and metrics before making any writes.
